## Change Type

- [ ] New module
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests

## Acceptance Checklist

- [ ] Design document updated
- [ ] Contract document updated
- [ ] Public API confirmed
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] Edge case tests added or updated
- [ ] Contract tests added or updated
- [ ] Integration tests added or marked not applicable
- [ ] Examples added or updated
- [ ] `kernel.manifest.yaml` updated
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` updated
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `govulncheck ./...` passes
- [ ] `kernel-lint ./...` passes or is not yet implemented
- [ ] `kernel-contract-check ./...` passes or is not yet implemented

## Breaking Change Notes

Describe migration steps for any breaking changes.

## Verification

Paste local or CI verification output.
